about.title: About
about.subtitle: Background & Experience
about.bio:
I'm a Software Engineer specializing in AI systems, specifically in designing and deploying production-grade RAG pipelines, LLM orchestration, and multi-agent workflows.

Over the past year, I've been working at the intersection of Generative AI and backend engineering: building intelligent patient support assistants using RAG and Vector Databases, designing APIs that connect LLMs to proprietary data, and driving the adoption of AI-assisted development practices within engineering teams.

My stack centers around Python, Node.js, LangChain, LangGraph, and AWS, with a focus on building systems that are not just functional, but reliable, low-latency, and hallucination-resistant.

I care deeply about the full lifecycle of an AI system: from data ingestion and chunking strategy to retrieval quality, prompt design, observability, and production deployment.

Currently based in Brazil, actively seeking AI Engineer and full-stack opportunities where I can keep building at the frontier of applied AI.
